info.name: ProductApiAuth - Week 7
info.description: Collection test authentication và phân quyền tuần 7. Các request login tự lưu token theo role để dùng cho các request phía sau.

exec: pm.test("User cannot delete a product", function () {
pm.test("Staff can create a product", function () {
pm.test("Staff can update a product", function () {
pm.test("Staff cannot delete a product", function () {
pm.test("Staff cannot get the user list", function () {
pm.test("Admin can get the user list", function () {
pm.test("Password hashes are not returned", function () {
pm.test("Admin can create a product", function () {
pm.test("Admin can update a product", function () {

item.name: Day 04 - Refresh Token
item.description: Login, rotate refresh token, verify the old token is rejected, logout, then verify the logged-out token cannot be reused.

exec: pm.test("A new access token is returned", function () {
pm.test("Rotated refresh token is rejected", function () {
pm.test("Revoked token message is returned", function () {
pm.test("Logged out refresh token is rejected", function () {
pm.test("Revoked token message is returned", function () {

item.name: Day 05 - Auth Regression
item.description: Luồng regression cuối tuần 7: đăng ký, đăng nhập, kiểm tra /me, quyền Category và quyền xóa/khôi phục Product. Dữ liệu Category và Product được dọn ở cuối folder.

exec: pm.test("Registered account has the User role", function () {
pm.test("Login returns access and refresh tokens", function () {
pm.test("Current user matches the registered account", function () {
pm.test("Creating a category without a token returns 401", function () {
pm.test("User cannot create a category", function () {
pm.test("Staff can create a category", function () {
pm.test("Staff can update a category", function () {
pm.test("Updated category name is returned", function () {
pm.test("Staff cannot delete a category", function () {
pm.test("Staff can create a product", function () {
pm.test("Created product is linked to the test category", function () {
pm.test("Admin can delete a product", function () {
pm.test("Restoring a product without a token returns 401", function () {
pm.test("User cannot restore a product", function () {
pm.test("Staff cannot restore a product", function () {
pm.test("Admin can restore a product", function () {
